parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'projects', json_build_object(
    'total_active', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')),
    'by_phase', (SELECT json_object_agg(current_phase, n) FROM (SELECT current_phase, count(*) AS n FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived') GROUP BY current_phase) t),
    'completed_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM projects WHERE current_phase='completed' AND completed_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'oldest_active_days', (SELECT EXTRACT(DAY FROM now() - min(updated_at))::int FROM projects WHERE status='active' AND current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived'))
  ),
  'pending_actions', json_build_object(
    'consultations', (SELECT count(*) FROM consultation_queue WHERE status='pending'),
    'invoices_pending', (SELECT count(*) FROM invoices WHERE status='pending'),
    'collab_overdue', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status NOT IN ('approved','closed','cancelled','rejected') AND deadline IS NOT NULL AND deadline < now()::date),
    'collab_pending_review', (SELECT count(*) FROM collab_assignments WHERE status='delivered' AND delivered_at < now() - INTERVAL '3 days'),
    'contracts_expiring_7d', (SELECT count(*) FROM contracts WHERE status IN ('sent','ready_to_sign','draft') AND expires_at BETWEEN now() AND now() + INTERVAL '7 days'),
    'aftercare_urgent', (SELECT count(*) FROM aftercare_incidents WHERE status NOT IN ('resolved','closed','cancelled') AND severity IN ('high','critical')),
    'qc_blocked', (SELECT count(*) FROM qc_checks WHERE status='blocked')
  ),
  'finance', json_build_object(
    'paid_30d_eur', COALESCE((SELECT round(sum(total_amount)::numeric, 2) FROM invoices WHERE status='paid' AND paid_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0),
    'pending_count', (SELECT count(*) FROM invoices WHERE status='pending')
  ),
  'concierge', json_build_object(
    'questions_30d', (SELECT count(*) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'),
    'cost_usd_30d', COALESCE((SELECT round(sum(llm_cost_usd)::numeric, 2) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days'), 0),
    'escalation_pct', (SELECT round(100.0 * count(*) FILTER (WHERE escalated) / NULLIF(count(*),0), 1) FROM client_conversations WHERE asked_at > now() - INTERVAL '30 days')
  ),
  'errors_24h', (SELECT count(*) FROM activity_log WHERE action='workflow_error' AND created_at > now() - INTERVAL '24 hours'),
  'recent_projects', (SELECT json_agg(t.*) FROM (
    SELECT p.id, p.name, p.current_phase, p.budget_target, p.updated_at, c.name AS client_name
      FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
     WHERE p.status='active' AND p.current_phase NOT IN ('completed','archived')
     ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC LIMIT 10
  ) t)
) AS report;
